# Disaster Recovery — Daily DevOps & .NET

> Disaster recovery covers backup, failover, and recovery strategies to ensure business continuity for cloud, Kubernetes, and enterprise systems.

Source: https://daily-devops.net/tags/disaster-recovery/
Generated: 2026-07-18

## About this topic

- [Topic landing page](https://daily-devops.net/tags/disaster-recovery/): Disaster recovery covers backup, failover, and recovery strategies to ensure business continuity for cloud, Kubernetes, and enterprise systems.
- [Back to all topics](https://daily-devops.net/tags/)

## Articles tagged "Disaster Recovery" (2)

- [AKS Disaster Recovery: Why Your Untested Backup Will Fail](https://daily-devops.net/posts/disaster-recovery-business-continuity-aks/): AKS outages happen. Build a tested DR plan with Velero, realistic RTO/RPO targets, and multi-region failover steps your team can run under pressure.
- [Storage Architecture & Stateful Workloads in AKS](https://daily-devops.net/posts/storage-architecture-stateful-workloads-aks/): PVC/PV patterns, Azure Disk vs Files trade-offs, Velero backup strategies, and cross-cluster replication for production stateful workloads in AKS.
